channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Friedrich Wilhelm Herschel’s clan
item.description: Source: here. Father Isak Herschel- amateur astronomer and science enthusiast in addition to being a professional musician. Taught all his sons science and music. …………….. Wilhelm (William) Herschel: What more needs to be said? Was fluent of in many European languages. Sophia (sister of Wilhelm) Many descendents of her were professional muscians Alexander: Brother of Wilhelm, made most telescopes for Wilhelm, professional telescope maker in Germany Carolina (Caroline):Assistant of Wilhelm (scarred by smallpox and Rickettsial infection, hence unmarried).

item.title: Longer survival: Scandinavia
item.description: The heathen tradition survived the longest in Scandinavia. In contrast in Southern “Germania” the destructive imposition of u2 by Charle etc completely destroyed the original religion. Like even in Sweden the killing of the king Sverker in 1156 CE might have been the last attempt at fighting against the crusade by the followers of the original religion. There was also a long struggle against Christian aggression in Norway well after the king converted & tried to impose his religion via missionaries.
